'''jahïfrïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygopodid|pygopodid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-h-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygopodid|pygopodid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| jahïfrïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || jæhïfrïfth || jæhïfrïfj || jæhïfrïfsh || jæhïfrïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || jahïfhïfrïfth || jahïfhïfrïfj || jahïfhïfrïfsh || jahïfhïfrïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || jahïfrïfth || jahïfrïfj || jahïfrïfsh || jahïfrïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || jahïffrïffth || jahïffrïffj || jahïffrïffsh || jahïffrïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || jahïfrïfïf || jahïfrïfïf || jahïfrïfïf || jahïfrïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || jahïfrïfth || jahïfrïfj || jahïfrïfsh || jahïfrïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || jahïfrïfïfl || jahïfrïfïfl || jahïfrïfïfl || jahïfrïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || jahïfrïfïfïf || jahïfrïfïfïf || jahïfrïfïfïf || jahïfrïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || jahïfrïfïfn || jahïfrïfïfn || jahïfrïfïfn || jahïfrïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || jahïfrïfïforo || jahïfrïfïforo || jahïfrïfïforo || jahïfrïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
